honest_scope: These are CANDIDATE intermediate-fidelity bridges between the BCR4BP L1 Lyapunov continuation family (#303 Phase 2) and existing catalogue rows. NOT a V-level promotion; NOT a catalogue writeback. Per the orbit-closure discipline and the feedback_orbit_closure_discipline + feedback_golden_tests_sourced_only memories: any actual promotion requires (1) a sourced family-family linkage, (2) matched conserved invariants, (3) HFEM real-ephemeris closure to claim V4. The L1 Lyapunov family has T ~ 12.8 d, so it is in the right ballpark to match short-period EM rows -- but the topology / family identity comparison is OUT OF SCOPE for this probe.

BCR4BP L1 Lyapunov family does NOT bridge this row (period deviation > 5%). The L1 Lyapunov family at C=3.1294 has T ~ 12.8 days; this row's period is elsewhere. A different BCR4BP family (different L_i, different Jacobi level, or a non-L1 family) might bridge -- not this one.
